---
title: "Igraph"
format: html
---

Now that I've extracted edgelists from a few key packages, I need to figure out what the best way to include node attributes is. 

```{r}
library(igraph)
df <- data.frame(source = c(1,1,2,2,3,4,4),
                 target = c(2,3,4,5,1,3,1))

df2 <- nodes
```



```{r}
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(df)

```



```{r}

```
